service.name: JokeAPI
service.description_for_ai: Free jokes API. Programming, puns, dark humor, misc jokes. Supports 7 languages including Russian. Content filters for safe mode. No API key needed.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get a random joke by category. Use for fun, ice breakers, entertainment features.

category.description: Any, Programming, Misc, Dark, Pun, Spooky, Christmas

lang.description: en, ru, de, fr, cs, pt

blacklistFlags.description: nsfw, religious, political, racist, sexist, explicit — comma separated to exclude
